title: Amtech V4010 P120 Grit 1/3 Sheet Sander Set, 10 piece Sanding Sheets, 93mm x 230mm Sanding Paper
features: MEDIUM SANDING: These 1/3 sanding sheets have a P120 grit for medium sanding and are perforated for dust extraction
VERSATILE: 93 x 230mm in size, they are ideal for sanding most types of wood and painted surfaces
USE WITH V6000: They are compatible with Amtech's 180W sander (stock code V6000) plus other brands
LOCKING MECHANISM: Safety lock ensures secure storage after use
SMOOTH ACTION: Spring-loaded for easy repeated cutting
description: Product Description The Amtech Sanding Sheet range is suitable for polishing various types of wood and painted surfaces, in order to achieve your desired finish. You can also use the sanding paper on metal surfaces and automotive coatings, whilst carrying out repairs. Amtech has a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3-year product guarantee. So, keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less.
